data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Automatic hold expiry and seat release' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented that demonstrate the automatic release of seats after a hold expires. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to support the requirement is missing.
gaps: No evidence of automatic hold expiry and seat release functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic hold expiry and seat release.
